name: schema-registry-dag-registration-gateway
description: T189 SchemaRegistrationGateway — TRANSACTION archetype. OCC publish gate, TWO-COLOR DFS cycle check, BREAKING approval routing, ADDITIVE fast-path, DAG async rebuild.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: OCC gate, three-state DFS, BREAKING approval routing, async DAG rebuild, schema version pin
Retrieve TRANSACTION arch pattern + OCC-publish-gate + two-color-dfs-cycle + breaking-change-gate + dag-rebuild-async patterns for T189
Break T189 into: structure-validate → SETNX → fetch-previous → T190-classify → T191-cycle-check → T193-compat → BREAKING/ADDITIVE route → audit-storeDocument → enqueue

Generate schema-registration-gateway.service.ts — tenantId from ALS (ClsService), schemaId=SHA-256(tenantId+schemaType+version), SETNX at order 2, T190 classifyChange() at order 3, T191 cycleCheck() at order 4, T193 compatCheck() at order 5. BREAKING → SchemaApprovalRequired, ADDITIVE → SchemaQueued. DNA-8: storeDocument(auditRecord) BEFORE enqueue.
Named check validation: setnx_before_classify, breaking_routes_to_approval, additive_routes_to_queued, store_before_enqueue, als_tenant_id
Score generated code 0-100 against T189 iron rules: OCC gate, three-state DFS, BREAKING approval, async DAG, version pin
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
